race.comment: YAKAMOZ (11) resumes in a winnable race for the new yard. Faded quickly on debut when seventh over 1400m at Kembla Grange last August. Fitted with the one trial placing over 1000m. Lugging bit goes on and can overcome the sticky gate. ALL SAINTS (1) back in class and now in the Sharon Jeffries yard. Ran a tough second two-back, then dropped out quickly with a dismal seventh over 1000m at Kembla Grange. Claim helps from the good gate and can figure prominently. DIRTY DANI (8) got too far back on debut with a battling eighth over 900m at Newcastle. Can improve on that effort and sneak into the minor money.
